description: You are a Navigation Instructor creating a 'Replenishment at Sea' (RAS) scenario in Bridge Command. Create a scenario in the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) RAS Exercise/' involving an Ownship ('USS Guide') and an Othership ('USNS Supply'). The 'USS Guide' starts at 50.00N, 0.00E, Heading 000, at 10 knots. The 'USNS Supply' starts 4.0nm directly South of the Ownship and must perform three legs: an approach at Bearing 000 and Speed 14 knots to close the 4nm gap; a station-keeping leg at Bearing 000 and Speed 10 knots for 30 minutes; and a breakaway at Bearing 045 and Speed 15 knots for 2.0nm. Calculate the required geographic distances for the first two legs and document your math in '/home/ga/Documents/ras_calc.txt'. Produce the 'environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini' files with these parameters in the specified scenario directory.
